{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Jade scepter badge
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|One of the elders in [[Sacred Valley]] wears a [[Jade scepter badge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
